title: File Transfer
lead: Pick a target device, then drag or click to send files. All transfers run over the LAN, with resume support and SHA256 verification.
dropAria: Drop a file here or click to select
dropTitleEmpty: Drop a file here or click to select
chunkHint: Any size · Auto-chunked 1MB · Resumable · SHA256 verified
emptyHint: Pick a target device and a file to start transferring
